vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete failure of the botanical registry. Across the five-day sequence, the pots have remained devoid of the expected plant life. The interventions (spoon, tube) were temporary and did not contribute to plant health. The current state is a static, barren environment with no biological activity.
